title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. Tried resetting password but still can’t.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay with Visa 1234 but payment keeps failing.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download January invoice. Download button unresponsive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows a different city after update.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested refund two weeks ago, still not received.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer not receiving 2FA codes on registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer gets 'Upload failed' error when updating profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Auto-renewal toggle disabled, customer wants to enable it.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer did not receive confirmation email despite successful payment.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer reports website pages taking too long to load on desktop.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer requested a password reset but never received the email.

title: Live Chat Not Working
description: Customer tried to contact support via live chat but it doesn’t connect.

title: Duplicate Transactions
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order on their credit card.

title: Notification Settings Not Saving
description: Customer updates notification preferences but they revert after refresh.
